# ATHOS — Architecting Teams for High-performance Outcomes & Scale

> Wolf Schram is a Culture Architect. He embeds with organisations, witnesses how they work, then acts.
> Not consulting. Not coaching. Architecture.

## Who is Wolf Schram

Wolfgang "Wolf" Schram. German-born, based in California. Former VP Engineering with roughly 250 engineers globally across broadcast, media and workplace technology. 15+ years touring broadcast engineer for U2, The Rolling Stones, Paul McCartney, Beyoncé, Queen — 55+ countries. ADHD and dyslexia — both viewed as superpowers.

Contact: wolfbroadcast@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/wolfgang-schram-a4837420/

## What ATHOS Does

ATHOS is Wolf's culture architecture practice. He works inside organisations — not from a conference room. He observes, listens, builds trust, then architects the conditions for genuine ownership and high performance.

Core belief: **People Own Outcomes.**
Tagline: **The Human in Focus.**
Mantra: **Own It. Build It. Stand Behind It.**

## The Six Leadership Principles

- **Purpose** — Clarity about why we are here. Not the job description. The real reason.
- **Ownership** — Real ownership is permission. Permission to decide, to fail, to say I don't know.
- **Symbiotic Teams** — The bee needs the flower. The flower needs the bee. Neither survives alone.
- **Honest Conversation** — A fool with a tool is still a fool. The conversation starts with the leader in the mirror.
- **Cognitive Diversity** — Some people can't think inside the box because they never had one. This is a superpower.
- **The Door** — Open doors for people. Don't need them to come back.

## Key Quotes

- "Does your culture fit your people's purpose — or do your people's purpose fit your culture?"
- "A fool with a tool is still a fool."
- "I don't drive people — I elevate them into who they need to be."
- "Open doors for people. Don't need them to come back."
- "Own It. Build It. Stand Behind It."

## Engagement Model

- Day rate: $2,000–$3,000
- Monthly retainer: $7,000–$10,000
- Project-based: $15,000–$30,000
